ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., iAat, iAde) */,
  "p_var" TEXT /* p-var value of the parameter (e.g., p6, p7) */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the parameter (e.g., attack, decay) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module the parameter belongs to (e.g., VCA, OSC1) */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter's range */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter's range */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the parameter belongs to */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the parameter performs */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is editable by users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module (e.g., VCA, OSC1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function (e.g., attack, decay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sound designer, musician, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presets" (
  "preset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the preset */,
  "preset_name" TEXT /* Name of the preset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preset was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preset is public or private */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the preset (for better searchability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preset_parameters" (
  "preset_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preset parameter */,
  "preset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preset the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter in the preset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preset parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preset parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preset_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preset_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preset_parameters_preset_id FOREIGN KEY ("preset_id") REFERENCES presets ("preset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_modules" (
  "user_module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user module */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_modules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_parameters" (
  "module_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module parameter */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter in the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the module parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the module parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_parameters_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (parameter, preset, or module) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (parameter, preset, or module) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (parameter, preset, or module) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (parameter, preset, or module) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sound designer, musician, admin) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new version, new preset) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
